title: Gate Vibe-Lab experiments by consumers
goal: Require every new Vibe-Lab experiment to name an external consumer, a concrete decision target, a measurable success or falsification criterion, an expiry and a deterministic promotion or closure outcome.

acceptance.assertion: New Vibe-Lab experiment registrations fail closed without a named current external consumer.
Each experiment states the concrete decision it informs and a measurable success, harm or falsification criterion.
Each experiment has a review or expiry date and a deterministic promote, pilot, defer, reject or archive path.
New experiments remove, replace or retire at least as much durable surface as they add, unless a reviewed exception explains the net cost.
Vibe-Lab cannot auto-apply routing, policy, queue, merge or runtime changes.

metadata.transfer_decision: Heimlern-specific proposal gating is retired; the surviving governance function belongs to Vibe-Lab experiments.
